title: [pycde] Unimplemented of comparison operators
body:
**Describe the issue:**
I noticed that the current code is missing the implementation of comparison operators such as greater than (>) and less than (<), which may lead to program errors.

**Error message:**
```bash
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "F:\project\pycde_example\mini_riscv\alu.py", line 44, in <module>
    mod.compile()
  File "C:\Users\towna\project\env\pycde_example\Lib\site-packages\pycde\system.py", line 318, in compile 
    self.generate()
  File "C:\Users\towna\project\env\pycde_example\Lib\site-packages\pycde\system.py", line 224, in generate
    m.generate()
  File "C:\Users\towna\project\env\pycde_example\Lib\site-packages\pycde\module.py", line 494, in generate
    outputs = g.gen_func(ports)
  File "F:\project\pycde_example\mini_riscv\alu.py", line 27, in build
    (io.A < io.B).as_sint(width),
     ^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "C:\Users\towna\project\env\pycde_example\Lib\site-packages\pycde\signals.py", line 468, in __lt__
    assert False, "Unimplemented"
AssertionError: Unimplemented
```

**Proposed solution**
I attempted to add its implementation in this PR.

I hope my contribution will be beneficial to the project. If you have any further suggestions or need additional assistance, please let me know. Thank you!
